summary: Frontend-only testing of new Admin panel features. All 12 test scenarios passed. Tested: customer edit dialog, orders table with pagination, order edit dialog fields, order delete/charge buttons, subscriptions edit/logs/renew buttons, subscription edit dialog, catalog terms dropdown, and audit logs dialog.
passed_tests: Admin login works with admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
Admin Customers tab: Edit button opens dialog with Full Name, Company Name, Job Title, Phone fields
Admin Customers tab: Email field is Read-only (disabled), Country (Locked) is disabled - 2 disabled inputs confirmed
Admin Customers tab: All address fields (Line1, Line2, City, State/Province, Postal Code) present and editable
Admin Customers tab: Save Changes button present in dialog
Admin Orders tab: Table loads with 20 rows (page 1 of 3)
Admin Orders tab: Pagination Previous/Next buttons visible and functional
Admin Orders tab: Page info shows 'Page 1 of 3' correctly
Admin Orders tab: Clicking Next loads page 2, Prev returns to page 1
Admin Orders tab: Edit button opens Order Edit Dialog (data-testid=admin-order-edit-dialog)
Admin Orders tab: Status dropdown present with all required options (Paid, Unpaid, Pending, Awaiting Bank Transfer, Pending Payment, Cancelled, Refunded, Disputed)
Admin Orders tab: Payment Method dropdown present (Card, Bank Transfer, Offline/Manual)
Admin Orders tab: Payment Date input present
Admin Orders tab: Internal Note textarea present
Admin Orders tab: Save Changes button present in order edit dialog
Admin Orders tab: Delete (Del) button exists for all 20 orders on page
Admin Orders tab: Charge button appears for orders with status=unpaid (5 found on page 1)
Admin Subscriptions tab: 7 subscriptions loaded
Admin Subscriptions tab: Edit button exists for each subscription (7 found)
Admin Subscriptions tab: Logs button exists for each subscription (7 found)
Admin Subscriptions tab: Renew button appears for manual subscriptions (5 of 7 are manual)
Admin Subscriptions tab: Edit dialog opens with Plan Name, Amount, Renewal Date inputs and Save Changes button
Admin Catalog tab: Table with 22 products loaded
Admin Catalog tab: Terms assignment dropdown per product works (22 dropdowns found)
Admin Catalog tab: Terms dropdown options include 'Default T&C', 'Default Terms & Conditions', 'test2'
Audit Logs dialog: Clicking Logs on order opens dialog titled 'Audit Logs' with log history entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new admin features verified. Key elements: admin-orders-prev/next pagination buttons work (3 pages of orders), admin-order-edit-dialog has status/payment-method/payment-date/note fields, admin-order-delete-{id} and admin-order-charge-{id} (charge only for unpaid), admin-sub-edit-dialog has plan-name/amount/renewal-date, admin-sub-renew-{id} only for manual subscriptions (is_manual=true), catalog has 22 Terms dropdowns per product row. All data-testid attributes present and functional.
mocked_api_notes: Zoho CRM sync, GoCardless payment, Email sending are MOCKED
